scripts.dev:mac: concurrently --names backend,frontend --prefix-colors blue.bold,green.bold --kill-others-on-fail "pnpm run dev:backend:mac" "pnpm run dev:frontend"
scripts.dev:win: concurrently --names backend,frontend --prefix-colors blue.bold,green.bold --kill-others-on-fail "pnpm run dev:backend:win" "pnpm run dev:frontend"
scripts.dev:backend:mac: cd backend && ([ -d .venv ] || python3 -m venv .venv) && .venv/bin/pip install -r requirements.txt -q --disable-pip-version-check && (lsof -ti:8000 | xargs kill -9 2>/dev/null; true) && .venv/bin/uvicorn api.app:app --reload --port 8000
scripts.dev:backend:win: cd backend && if not exist .venv python -m venv .venv && .venv\Scripts\pip install -r requirements.txt -q --disable-pip-version-check && .venv\Scripts\uvicorn api.app:app --reload --port 8000
scripts.dev:frontend: cd frontend && pnpm install --silent && pnpm run dev
